text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
choice_data_list: It's unusual for you to be so tired.
It's unusual for you to be so tired.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes... The truth is, Gold Ship barged into my
room last night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
She said that if you pray to the gods under a
legendary tree late at night, you'll lose a bunch of
weight.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's not that I believed her, but I thought if there
was even the slightest chance it might be true, it
would be worthwhile, so I went along.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yet, in the middle of the search, she complained
she was bored and turned back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... If she ever invites me again, I'd do well to turn her down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen lets out another elongated
yawn. Clearly, she's endured quite the long night
out.
